name: pheno-config
absorption_note: Federated crate of phenotype-infra (ADR-049). Typed Config + ConfigBuilder pulled into the federation workspace as the compute/infra config substrate. Pairs with pheno-compose (config inputs) and nvms-ffi (typed config exported across the C-ABI).
rationale: Canonical config library inside phenotype-infra. The legacy phenotype-config standalone repo (projects/phenotype-config.json, status=active RFC-002 owner) remains a separate entry; this federation crate is the new canonical artifact for the phenotype-infra compute/infra workspace. Per ADR-049 the standalone repo is archived as the workspace crate takes over. Pairs with the configra substrate (catalog/registry.yaml) via the ConfigPort trait.
note: Federated crate (2026-06-24 registry sync). Filename `pheno-config.json` (not `phenotype-config.json`) to avoid collision with the existing standalone-repo project entry (projects/phenotype-config.json, RFC 002 owner). The standalone repo file should be dispositioned ARCHIVE_ONLY in a follow-up cycle; pending that, both entries coexist by slug.
